bluetooth_confirm.description:
Do you want to set up {name}?

While Home Assistant is connected, the Storz & Bickel app cannot connect to this device at the same time.

user.description: Select a Storz & Bickel device to set up. Make sure it is powered on, in range, and not connected to the Storz & Bickel app.

abort.no_devices_found: No Storz & Bickel devices found nearby. Make sure the device is on, in range, and not connected to another app.
abort.not_supported: This device is not a supported Storz & Bickel vaporizer

data_description.temperature_unit: Unit the climate entity displays temperatures in, independent of the device's own screen and Home Assistant's system-wide unit.
data_description.pump_failsafe_enabled: Automatically turn the pump off after it has been running for the failsafe window.
data_description.pump_failsafe_seconds: How long the pump may run before the failsafe turns it off.
data_description.pump_cooldown_enabled: Prevent turning the pump back on right after it turns off.
data_description.pump_cooldown_seconds: How long to wait after the pump turns off before it may be turned on again.

pump_cooldown_active.message: The pump was just turned off; wait {remaining} more seconds before turning it on again.

workflow_already_running.message: A workflow is already running; stop it before starting another.
